name: claude-hooks-server-deploy-restart
tags: deploy restart launchctl kickstart server reload worktree dev test main pipeline
body: Server has no --reload. Restart is always via deploy.sh after merging dev→test: `launchctl kickstart -k gui/$(id -u)/<plist-label>`. Never restart manually. Use /deploy skill which runs deploy.sh (dev→test, unit gate + full suite) then deploy.sh --ship (test→main). Deploy is the only path to restart.
